name: Onehouse
description: Universal managed data lakehouse service built on Apache Hudi with open engines (Flyte, Trino, Ray) for AI/ML workloads.

seo.title: Onehouse — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Onehouse: Universal managed data lakehouse service built on Apache Hudi with open engines (Flyte, Trino, Ray) for AI/ML workloads.

when_to_use: Managed data lakehouse on Apache Hudi with open engines
Universal Hudi ingestion from Kafka, DMS, and object storage
Replacing custom Hudi pipelines with a managed lakehouse SaaS
Enabling Trino, Flink, and Ray queries on the same Hudi tables
AI/ML feature engineering pipelines on managed Hudi lakehouse

pros: Built by Apache Hudi creators directly
Open engine choice avoids compute lock-in
cons: Hudi ecosystem smaller than Iceberg's momentum
Less mature than Databricks lakehouse stack
review.verdict: Interesting managed lakehouse for multi-format shops; Iceberg-first teams may still prefer Tabular/Databricks.
review.best_for: Data platform teams wanting managed Hudi plus multi-engine openness
review.not_for: Teams already committed to Databricks or pure Iceberg stack

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
